summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of CircleSite landing page. All backend APIs (10/10 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Contact form submits to MongoDB, WhatsApp popup functional, all sections render properly.

issues: First portfolio image (Harbourside Bistro) shows a MacBook with black/blank screen - consider using an image with actual website content displayed

test_credentials: No auth required - public landing page
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: Backend APIs (root, health, contact POST, submissions GET), Frontend sections (hero, features, process, portfolio, testimonials, pricing, FAQ, contact, footer), Navigation scroll, FAQ accordion, WhatsApp popup, Contact form with validation and success/error toasts. Resend email is MOCKED (no API key) - email_sent=false is expected behavior. MongoDB persistence verified.

backend: GET /api/ returns 200 with message and ok=true
GET /api/health returns ok status with resend_configured=false
POST /api/contact with valid data returns 200 with ok=true and id
Data persistence verified - submissions saved to MongoDB
frontend: Home page loads without JS errors
All 9 main sections render (hero, features, process, portfolio, testimonials, pricing, FAQ, contact, footer)
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Pricing cards show correct prices (Starter £149, Standard £249, Pro Custom) with monthly fees
Standard pricing card has 'Most Popular' badge
Contact form shows error toast on empty submission
Contact form submits successfully and shows success toast
Contact form clears after successful submission
WhatsApp floating button visible and opens popup
WhatsApp popup 'Start chat' links to wa.me/447494852204

mocked_apis.Resend email: MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY is empty, email_sent=false is expected behavior. Submissions still saved to MongoDB.
